name: code-archaeology-analyst
description: Autonomous codebase archaeology agent. Triggered by a GitHub Issue or Azure DevOps Work Item tagged 'code-archaeology'. Segments the codebase, maps architecture in business language, extracts coding conventions, runs a due diligence audit for defects and structural problems, classifies all work into typed and prioritised items, and delivers a single structured archaeology report as comments on the originating issue or work item.
